name: WeChat Article to Markdown
description_en: Fetch a WeChat public-account article from its mp.weixin.qq.com link and convert it to a Markdown file—extracting title, author, and body, preserving formatting, downloading images locally, with an Obsidian output mode.
description_zh: 从 mp.weixin.qq.com 链接抓取微信公众号文章并转换为 Markdown 文件——提取标题、作者与正文,保留格式,把图片下载到本地,并支持 Obsidian 输出模式。
long_en: Turns ephemeral WeChat articles into durable local Markdown you can archive or drop into a knowledge base.
long_zh: 把易逝的微信文章变成可归档、可入知识库的持久本地 Markdown。
sec_note_en: Fetches content from WeChat article URLs you provide and saves Markdown and images locally; respect the source's copyright and Terms of Service.
sec_note_zh: 从你提供的微信文章 URL 抓取内容并在本地保存 Markdown 与图片;请尊重来源的版权与服务条款。
